pickipediareleases-desc: Provides a Release: namespace where page titles are IPFS CIDs. Automatically displays pin status, backlinks, and optional metadata.
pickipediareleases-api-desc: List all releases (CIDs from page titles) with optional metadata
apihelp-releaselist-summary: List all releases with their IPFS CIDs (from page titles) for pinning service synchronization
action-upload-to-delivery-kid: upload content to the delivery-kid pinning service
right-upload-to-delivery-kid: Upload content directly to the delivery-kid IPFS pinning service
action-finalize-release: finalize a release draft and pin to IPFS
right-finalize-release: Finalize release drafts (pin to IPFS via delivery-kid)
releasedraft-missing-draft-id: Release draft is missing a draft_id field.
releasedraft-missing-type: Release draft is missing a type field.
